creator: buganini@gmail.com
text:
x11-fonts/bitstream-vera has
MTREE_FILE=     /etc/mtree/BSD.x11-4.dist

and BSD.x11-4.dist is removed. (r196767, r196768)

How-To-Repeat: Zeta# cd /usr/ports/x11-fonts/bitstream-vera/
Zeta# make install
===>  Installing for bitstream-vera-1.10_4
===>   bitstream-vera-1.10_4 depends on executable: fc-cache - found
===>   Generating temporary packing list
===>  Checking if x11-fonts/bitstream-vera already installed
Error: mtree file "/etc/mtree/BSD.x11-4.dist" is missing.
Copy it from a suitable location (e.g., /usr/src/etc/mtree) and try again.
*** Error code 1

Stop in /usr/ports/x11-fonts/bitstream-vera.
